crime.value: Murder by gunshot - mother shot three times (twice in chest, once in neck) in bathroom
crime.quote: She had two gunshot holes through her chest and one through her neck.

victim.value: The narrator's mother, found dead in bathroom
victim.quote: I came home and found my mother on the bathroom tile floor.

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown killers (referred to as 'them pricks') - motive unclear, continuing to threaten narrator
culprit_and_motive.quote: I'm gonna hunt you down and bury you under neath my home

investigator.value: The victim's daughter (narrator) who discovered the body, working with police officers
investigator.quote: I came home and found my mother on the bathroom tile floor.

clue_fairness.value: Basic clues provided - phone threat content, timeline of discovery, narrator's alibi at park during murder
clue_fairness.quote: i was at the park for my mourning jog. They did a background check and realized i was telling the truth.

social_world.value: Police protection hierarchy with officers Dave and Detective John managing witness protection protocols
social_world.quote: They let me go home after they let me stay at a hotel for free wile my home got cleaned.

alibi.value: Narrator claims to have been at park jogging during mother's murder, verified by police background check
alibi.quote: i was at the park for my mourning jog. They did a background check and realized i was telling the truth.

investigator_wound.value: Narrator is victim's daughter, making her both witness and bereaved family member seeking justice
investigator_wound.quote: I came home and found my mother on the bathroom tile floor. She had two gunshot holes through her chest
